subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of Samandar, upon him be My glory, which he addressed unto thee, hath been brought before Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی علیک بهائی نامه سمندر علیه بهائی که بانجناب نوشته تلقاء وجه حاضر ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @idolatry, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
